2606.18071.title: Volterra Generative Models
2606.18071.paper_summary: Score-based diffusion models typically use Brownian perturbations, which provide tractable reverse-time dynamics but impose memoryless noising. We introduce Volterra generative models, a continuous-time score-based framework whose forward process injects path-dependent noise through fractional kernels. To handle the non-Markovian and non-semimartingale dynamics, we construct finite-dimensional Markovian lifts using Gaussian quadrature in both regimes and a hybrid finite-difference exponential approximation in the smooth regime. We prove squared error bounds, derive an augmented linear-Gaussian forward process, and show that the learning can remain data-dimensional by considering residual states and analytic auxiliary Gaussian scores. We also identify covariance and reverse-time degeneracies caused by shared Brownian factors and signed smooth-regime weights. The degeneracy motivates stabilized conditioning and, for stiff larger lifts, a Gaussian-bridge reconstruction sampler. Experiments on MNIST and CIFAR-10 show that persistent fractional perturbations with small Markovian lifts can improve score-based generation on MNIST and provide a promising extension to natural images, while the bridge sampler provides a stability mechanism for larger lifts.
2606.18071.paper_summary_zh: 基於分數的擴散模型通常使用布朗擾動，這提供了可處理的反向時間動力學，但強加了無記憶的噪聲。我們引入了Volterra生成模型，這是一個基於分數的連續時間框架，其前向過程通過分數核注入路徑依賴的噪聲。為了處理非馬爾可夫和非半馬爾可夫的動力學，我們使用高斯求積在兩個範疇中構建有限維的馬爾可夫提升，並在光滑範疇中使用混合有限差分指數近似。我們證明了平方誤差界限，推導出增強的線性高斯前向過程，並顯示通過考慮殘差狀態和解析輔助高斯分數，學習可以保持數據維度。我們還識別了由於共享布朗因子和有符號光滑範疇權重所引起的協方差和反向時間的退化。這種退化促使了穩定的條件化，對於較大的剛性提升，則是一個高斯橋重建取樣器。在MNIST和CIFAR-10上的實驗顯示，持續的分數擾動與小的馬爾可夫提升可以改善MNIST上的基於分數的生成，並為自然圖像提供了一個有前景的擴展，而橋取樣器則為較大的提升提供了一個穩定性機制。
2606.18071.author: Yusen Jia et.al.
